fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the loop.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the field's content.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the loop.

fields.name: task
fields.description: The identifier or name of the assigned task.

fields.name: plan
fields.description: A textual representation of the operational plan.

fields.name: iterations
fields.description: The number of times a process repeats.

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.description: The maximum number of iterations allowed.

fields.name: result
fields.description: The output or outcome of a process or operation.

fields.name: currentTool
fields.description: The name of the tool currently being executed.

fields.name: lastToolResult
fields.description: The outcome of the last tool execution.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Details about any errors encountered during processing.

fields.name: currentStep
fields.description: The index of the current step in a sequence.

fields.name: totalSteps
fields.description: The total number of steps in the process.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: A sequence of actions or operations to be performed.

fields.name: toolName
fields.description: The name of the tool being used.

fields.name: args
fields.description: Arguments passed to the function.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text input provided to the tool.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text-based output generated by a tool.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Specifies the source or origin of the data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The identifier of the language model used.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens used.

fields.name: maxTokens
fields.description: The maximum number of tokens allowed for processing.

fields.name: usage
fields.description: Represents the number of times the component has been utilized.

fields.name: current
fields.description: The current value of a numerical measurement or counter.

fields.name: max
fields.description: The maximum value allowed or supported.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: A numerical value representing a limit or boundary.

fields.name: lastCompactedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last compaction event.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The operation or command to be executed.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: A detailed explanation or note about a specific event.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: The date and time when an event occurred.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: The time taken to complete a process, measured in numerical units.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of the completion message.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification generated.
